package rulecoverage

func PositiveGzipReaderWriterRecreatedPerItem() string {
    ruleID := "gzip_reader_writer_recreated_per_item"
    family := "hot_path"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "gzip.NewReader(...) or gzip.NewWriter(...) recreated inside iterative paths instead of per stream."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
